data.title: Applications open for $50,000 prizes for immigrant culinary professionals and storytellers. Various roles eligible.
data.description: Attention to all immigrant professionals with expertise and creativity in the food and beverage industry: Whether you are a chef, brewer, baker, mixologist, food filmmaker, journalist, chocolatier, sommelier, historian, cheese maker, food stylist, content creator, caterer, pastry chef, food critic, distiller, culinary writer, tester, or other related occupation, we want to hear your stories and experiences. Share your unique perspectives and talents to celebrate the diverse culinary landscape. Join us in showcasing the skills and traditions of immigrants in this field.

data.title: Seek Labs awarded $2M federal grant to develop CRISPR-based avian flu therapeutic in partnership with CFIA.
data.description: In Salt Lake City, Seek Labs has been awarded a $2 million grant from USDA APHIS for their work on a mutation-resistant avian influenza therapeutic using CRISPR technology. This collaboration with CFIA aims to develop a solution to combat avian influenza in birds.

data.title: Global Elevator and Escalator Market to reach $248.9 billion by 2032 due to smart elevator adoption and modernization - Maximize Market Research.
data.description: In Pune, India on February 17, 2026, it was reported that the Global Elevator and Escalator Market is experiencing a significant shift due to factors such as increasing urban density, the uptake of smart building technology, and the renovation of older infrastructure which are redefining the priorities within vertical transportation. The market, which was valued at USD 150.4 million, is undergoing a new phase of development.

Armed group Hezbollah rejected on Tuesday the Lebanese government's decision to grant the army at least four months to advance the second phase of a nationwide disarmament plan, saying it would not accept what it sees as a move serving Israel.

data.title: Bilt appoints Sam Bakhshandehpour as President of Local Merchants, expanding its ecosystem across dining, hotels, travel, and retail.
data.description: Bilt, a membership service centered around residents' living spaces, has recently appointed Sam Bakhshandehpour as the President of Local Merchants. Taking on this position, he will spearhead the growth of Bilt in various sectors including dining, hotels, travel, retail, and local commerce. By revolutionizing loyalty programs to allow members to accrue rewards based on housing expenses, Bilt has been reshaping the consumer loyalty landscape. The company aims to create a nationwide network that links residential living with dining, travel, and retail experiences.

data.title: Young immigrant biomedical scientists can win $50,000 Vilcek Prizes for Creative Promise in various research fields.
data.description: Attention all biomedical professionals specializing in a wide range of fields including biochemistry, bioengineering, bioinformatics, biophysics, cancer research, cell biology, chemical biology, computational biology, developmental biology, endocrinology, epidemiology, human disease, immunology, infectious diseases, and microbiology. Your expertise is critical in advancing research and innovation in the medical field. Join us in our effort to collaborate and explore groundbreaking opportunities in these areas. Contact us now to be a part of this essential community.

data.title: InventHelp inventor from Hendersonville creates new building structure and hydro leveling support system called ARK ANGELS.
data.description: In Pittsburgh on February 17, 2026, a consultant from Hendersonville, North Carolina shared his motivation behind creating a new innovation for retail manufactured homes. The inventor expressed his desire to safeguard homes from various natural disasters such as floods, wind, and fire. This led to the invention of ARK ANGELS, a protective design aimed at providing resilience.

data.title: Recordati's preliminary full year 2025 results show revenue up by 11.8%, EBITDA up by 14.5%, and adjusted net income up by 14.5%.
data.description: Recordati has announced impressive preliminary results for the full year 2025. The company saw a substantial increase in revenue by 11.8%, while EBITDA and adjusted net income both surged by 14.5%. These robust figures showcase Recordati's strong performance and growth in the past year.

data.title: Freddy's offers $1 Original Doubles on National Steakburger Day, Feb 24; exclusive deal with app download.
data.description: Get a $1 Freddy's Original Double on Feb. 24 by downloading the Freddy's app. Freddy's Frozen Custard & Steakburgers® in WICHITA, Kan. shared this offer on Feb. 17, 2026. The promotion is part of an annual event for loyal customers.

data.title: XFERALL expands patient transfer platform in Southern California, improving behavioral health patient placement.
data.description: On February 17, 2026, XFERALL, a prominent real-time patient transfer and care coordination platform, revealed the expansion of its technology in Southern California. This move aims to enhance access to quicker and more effective behavioral health patient placement. This expansion is set to impact a significant number of patients in need of immediate care, improving their overall experience and outcomes.

data.title: Ex-FCC Commissioner Geoffrey Starks joins Latham & Watkins in Washington, D.C, bringing regulatory expertise. WASHINGTON, Feb. 17, 2026.
data.description: Geoffrey Starks, a seasoned communications regulator, has joined the Washington, D.C. office of a prestigious firm. On February 17, 2026, Latham & Watkins LLP shared the news. Starks, who previously served as a Commissioner at the Federal Communications Commission, brings extensive regulatory and policy expertise to the team.

data.title: UN Global Compact Network USA released 2025 Annual Report highlighting private sector's commitment to responsible business.
data.description: On February 11, 2026, the UN Global Compact Network USA (Network USA) released its Annual Report for 2025, showcasing significant progress and engagement within the private sector. The report illustrates a year of expansion, cooperation, and ongoing dedication to promoting ethical and sustainable business behaviors. Serving as the US branch of the United Nations Global Compact, the organization has demonstrated a strong commitment to fostering responsible business conduct.

data.title: Advance Auto Parts (AAP) beats Q4 earnings with EPS of 86 cents (vs 42 cents est.) and sales of $1.973 billion (vs $1.952 billion est.). FY 2026 adjusted earnings expected at $2.40 to $3.10 per share, with sales forecasted at $8.485 billion to $8.575 billion. CEO Shane O'Kelly credits team's hard work towards a successful 2025.
data.description: Advance Auto Parts Inc. (NYSE: AAP) had a robust fourth quarter performance, surpassing expectations. The company reported adjusted earnings per share of 86 cents, well above the predicted 42 cents. Quarterly sales stood at $1.973 billion, higher than the expected $1.952 billion. For fiscal 2026, Advance Auto anticipates adjusted earnings per share ranging from $2.40 to $3.10, compared to analysts' forecast of $2.66. Sales for the year are projected to be between $8.485 billion and $8.575 billion, falling short of the estimated $8.668 billion. Shane O'Kelly, the president and CEO, expressed satisfaction with the progress made in 2025 and acknowledged the hard work of the team. The foundation laid in 2025 sets the stage for a promising future for the company.

data.title: LangChain's AI coding agent moves up 25 spots on benchmark, reaching Top 5 without model changes. Learn why.
data.description: LangChain's coding agent made significant progress by advancing from the Top 30 to the Top 5 rankings on Terminal Bench 2.0. This remarkable climb was achieved by making adjustments to the harness. The developers can learn valuable insights from this success and potentially implement similar strategies. For more details, continue reading.

data.title: Avenue Z acquires Varfaj, a Shopify partner, forming a full-funnel growth agency for DTC brands in Miami.
data.description: In Miami, Avenue Z, a renowned influence agency focusing on enhancing revenue and reputation for dynamic brands, has revealed its acquisition of Varfaj. Varfaj is a well-regarded Shopify development and optimization partner acknowledged for crafting top-notch commerce experiences. This move bolsters Avenue Z’s comprehensive services and establishes the agency as a key player in the future of commerce: AI-driven, agent-led purchasing encounters. Notable platforms such as OpenAI are setting the stage for this exciting evolution.
